visual_description:
A close-up shot focuses on the face of a man with short, dark hair and glasses. He is wearing a light-colored suit jacket over a collared shirt. The background is completely dark, with a cool, greenish-blue light illuminating him from the front. In the top right corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. At the bottom of the frame, white Chinese characters appear, which translate to "Very good-looking." The camera remains static, holding the tight shot on the man's face. The audio opens with a low, tense, and suspenseful musical score that creates a feeling of unease and anticipation. The sound of hurried footsteps on a hard surface can be heard, suggesting a sense of urgency and movement.

The camera cuts to a medium shot of three men walking forward in a dimly lit, dark environment. The man in the center, who is the focus, wears a light-colored jacket with a floral-patterned scarf around his neck. To his left, a man in a red jacket and a patterned bandana looks down.
